summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iberis invoice app authentication and onboarding flows. All core features working correctly: registration, login, company onboarding, and protected route redirection.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests (acceptable but non-standard)
Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on form inputs and buttons for automated testing

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to Login.js, Register.js, and CompanyOnboarding.js for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements (inputs, buttons, selects) in auth pages
CompanyOnboarding.js line 158: window.location.reload() after navigate() is redundant and causes unnecessary page reload
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users and companies created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth and onboarding flows verified working. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_auth_companies.py cover registration, login, companies CRUD. Test users created: onboard_test@test.com (has company), onboard_only@test.com (for onboarding tests). The ObjectId serialization bug mentioned in agent context has been fixed.

registration_flow.details: Form at /register with full name, company name (required), email, password fields. Successfully creates user and company, redirects to dashboard.

login_flow.details: Form at /login with email and password. Successfully authenticates and redirects to dashboard.

mandatory_onboarding.details: Users without company are redirected to /onboarding. ProtectedRoute in App.js correctly checks for company existence.

onboarding_form.details: Two-column layout with Logo/Accounting info on left, General info on right. All dropdowns (Exercice, Devise, Activité, Pays) pre-filled and working.

companies_api.details: POST /api/companies/ creates company, GET /api/companies/ lists user companies. CRUD operations working.

redirect_after_company_creation.details: After company creation in onboarding, user is redirected to /dashboard.
